title: Sceniform MVP Launch
description: The official public release of the Sceniform engine, bringing secure, side-by-side Make.com blueprint diffing to automation agencies.

changes.message: Introduced Connection Mapping: Dynamically map and verify environment connections (e.g., Sandbox to Production) before confirming a deployment.
Implemented enterprise-grade API key storage and multi-tenant workspace isolation for distinct organizations and teams.
Added active/inactive scenario indicators and terminal-style error handling directly linked to the source scenarios.

title: Complex Routing & Merge Module Support
description: Major upgrades to the DAG parsing engine to handle complex scenario architectures and edge cases.

changes.message: Added deep support for if/else logic and Merge modules. The Differ now correctly tracks variables across unified paths after a Router split.
Fixed a cascading diff issue where child modules were incorrectly flagged as changed when only the parent module was updated.
Interactive Tracing: Clicking on mapped variables now accurately auto-scrolls to the origin module, even across deeply nested graphs.

title: Mapping Readability & Engine Performance
description: Enhancements to how variable mappings are displayed and backend rendering performance.

changes.message: Human-Readable Mappings: The UI now parses and displays human-readable labels in mappings instead of raw Make.com variable IDs.
Added secure backend proxy caching (EF Core) for third-party module logos.

title: Alpha: Core DAG Visualization
description: The initial build of the Sceniform differ engine and vertical graph layout.

changes.message: Router Analysis: The engine now visually distinguishes between main routes, collapsing router branches, and explicitly identifies disabled routes.
Introduced the side-by-side blueprint viewer with intelligent indentation.
